title: A-Frame Two-Bedroom Pool Villa in Kedungu, Bali
blurb: An upscale two-bedroom A-frame pool villa in Kedungu — Bali's next emerging corner of the Pererenan expat corridor, three minutes from the beach and surf. A striking soaring-roof design over warm timber interiors, a private pool and uninterrupted jungle and rice-field views. Off-plan, just two units remaining, from $219,000 with a projected 8.5–9.5% net yield.
detail:
Luxury Huts is a small collection of upscale two-bedroom villas in Kedungu, an emerging residential pocket on Bali's south-west coast, three minutes from the beach and a short ride from Seseh and Pererenan — the island's fast-growing expat corridor. Designed as both a home and a professionally managed investment, it is built for long-term capital growth and stable rental income.

The architecture is the signature: a soaring A-frame roofline in thatch and timber over a light-filled, double-height living space, with full-height glazing opening to a private pool, terrace and garden. Downstairs holds the open living, kitchen, pool and covered parking; upstairs, two bedrooms and two bathrooms (2.5 in total) sit beneath the pitched ceiling. Warm wood, rattan and natural stone give the interiors a relaxed, contemporary-Balinese character.

The outlook is protected: uninterrupted jungle views from the bedroom and garden, with portions of the adjacent rice fields preserved from development. It is two minutes to Pigstone Beach and the surf, under five to bars and restaurants, fifteen to the OMNI Wellness Club and about an hour to Denpasar airport.

The villa sits on a 220 m² plot with 120 m² of covered area and a 17 m² pool, offered off-plan with a 14-month build and only two units left in the current phase. Held on a 25+5-year leasehold, priced from $219,000 with a projected 8.5–9.5% net annual yield and a projected stabilised value of $260,000–$300,000. Payment schedule, floor plans and the investment breakdown are available on request.
